# LEGAL NOTICE

---

**FROM:**

**[LANDLORD FULL NAME]**
S/o. [FATHER'S NAME]
Residing at: [FULL ADDRESS]
Contact: [PHONE NUMBER]
Email: [EMAIL ADDRESS]
PAN: [PAN NUMBER]

**Through/By:**

[NAME OF ADVOCATE/LAW FIRM, IF APPLICABLE]
[ADVOCATE ADDRESS, IF APPLICABLE]

---

**TO:**

**Rhugved Dangui**
S/o. [FATHER'S NAME]
Residing at: [FULL ADDRESS]
Contact: [PHONE NUMBER]
Email: [EMAIL ADDRESS]
PAN: [PAN NUMBER]

---

**DATE:** [DATE OF ISSUANCE — DD/MM/YYYY]

**PLACE:** [CITY/TOWN]

---

## SUBJECT: LEGAL NOTICE FOR RECOVERY OF OUTSTANDING RENT AND VACANT POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES

---

### THROUGH ADVOCATE

**Sir/Madam,**

This Legal Notice is issued on behalf of our Client, **[LANDLORD FULL NAME]** (hereinafter referred to as "the **Landlord**"), whose complete particulars are stated hereinabove, to you, **Rhugved Dangui** (hereinafter referred to as "the **Tenant**"), at your above-mentioned address, for the causes and reasons set forth hereunder:

---

### FACTS

1. That our Client is the rightful, absolute, and lawful owner of a **/[2-BHK APARTMENT / INDEPENDENT HOUSE / SHOP / OFFICE]** situated at **[PROPERTY FULL ADDRESS]** (hereinafter referred to as "the **Demised Premises**" or "the **Said Property**").

2. That a tenancy arrangement was entered into between our Client (as Landlord) and yourself (as Tenant) with respect to the Said Property, commencing from **[TENANCY START DATE — DD/MM/YYYY]** and ending on **[TENANCY END DATE — DD/MM/YYYY]**, for a period of **[TENANCY DURATION]**, under the terms and conditions as contained in the registered/unregistered Rent Agreement dated **[AGREEMENT DATE — DD/MM/YYYY]**, executed at **[PLACE OF SIGNING]**.

3. That as per the terms of the said Rent Agreement:
   - The monthly rent payable by you was fixed at **Rs. [MONTHLY RENT]** (Rupees [AMOUNT IN WORDS] only);
   - The security deposit/advance paid by you was **Rs. [SECURITY DEPOSIT]** (Rupees [AMOUNT IN WORDS] only);
   - The rent was payable on or before the **[RENT PAYMENT DATE]** of every month;
   - The mode of payment was agreed to be **[BANK TRANSFER / CASH / CHEQUE]**;
   - The maintenance charges were **[MAINTENANCE CHARGES DETAILS]';
   - Parking facility was **[INCLUDED / NOT INCLUDED / EXTRA COST]';
   - A lock-in period of **[LOCK IN PERIOD]** was agreed upon;
   - The notice period required for termination of tenancy was **[NOTICE PERIOD]'.

4. That the Said Property comprises **[DESCRIPTION OF PROPERTY — FLOOR, AREA, ROOMS, ETC.]**.

5. That in terms of the agreed tenancy arrangement, certain other terms were mutually agreed upon, including: **[ANY OTHER TERMS — E.G., NO PETS ALLOWED / NO SUBLETTING / NO RENOVATIONS WITHOUT PRIOR APPROVAL / ANY OTHER SPECIFIC TERMS]**.

6. That our Client has always fulfilled and complied with all obligations, covenants, and terms under the said Rent Agreement and has never committed any breach whatsoever of the terms thereof.

7. That notwithstanding the clear terms of the Agreement and the repeated requests/messages/letters (if any) made by our Client or on his behalf, you have committed the following defaults:
   - **[SPECIFY DEFAULT — E.G., FAILURE TO PAY RENT FOR THE MONTH(S) OF _______ / UNAUTHORIZED ALTERATIONS / SUBLETTING WITHOUT PERMISSION / KEEPING PETS IN VIOLATION OF AGREEMENT / ANY OTHER BREACH]**;
   - That the outstanding amount due and payable by you towards rent/maintenance/other charges amounts to **Rs. [OUTSTANDING AMOUNT]** (Rupees [AMOUNT IN WORDS] only) as on **[DATE]';
   - That despite due demands, you have failed, neglected, and/or refused to make payment of the said outstanding dues.

8. That your conduct and actions constitute a material breach of the terms and conditions of the Rent Agreement and have caused undue hardship, mental agony, and financial loss to our Client.

9. That our Client has been constrained to engage our services and instruct us to issue the present Legal Notice to you.

---

### LEGAL BASIS

10. That this Notice is issued in accordance with and under the following legal provisions:
    - **Section 106 of the Transfer of Property Act, 1882** — governing the determination of a tenancy by a notice to quit;
    - **Section 108 of the Transfer of Property Act, 1882** — governing the rights and liabilities of the Lessor and Lessee;
    - **Rent Control Laws** applicable in the State/[City], including the **[NAME OF APPLICABLE RENT CONTROL ACT — E.G., DELHI RENT CONTROL ACT, 1958 / MAHARASHTRA RENT CONTROL ACT, 1999 / KARNATAKA RENT ACT, 1999 / ANY OTHER]**;
    - **Order XXXVII of the Code of Civil Procedure, 1908** — for recovery of money claims;
    - **Principles of Natural Justice** and equity;
    - **Various judicial precedents** of the Hon'ble Supreme Court and various High Courts.

11. That it is a well-settled principle of law that a tenant who commits a default in payment of rent or who violates the terms and conditions of the tenancy agreement loses the protection of the Rent Control Act and is liable to be evicted.

12. That the Hon'ble Supreme Court and various High Courts have consistently held that a landlord is entitled to recover possession of his/her property upon termination of the tenancy and that a tenant is bound to vacate the premises upon the expiry of the notice period.

---

### DEMAND

13. That **WITHOUT PREJUDICE** to any rights and remedies available to our Client under law, and notwithstanding any other cause of action that may accrue to our Client, our Client hereby calls upon you, through this Legal Notice, to:

    **(a)** Pay the outstanding rent and/or dues amounting to **Rs. [OUTSTANDING AMOUNT]** (Rupees [AMOUNT IN WORDS] only), comprising:
       - Arrears of rent: Rs. [AMOUNT]
       - Maintenance charges: Rs. [AMOUNT]
       - Any other charges: Rs. [AMOUNT]
       - Interest thereon (if applicable): Rs. [AMOUNT]

    **(b)** Immediately cease and desist from any further violation of the terms and conditions of the Rent Agreement;

    **(c)** Deliver peaceful and vacant possession of the Said Property to our Client;

    **(d)** Execute a Rent Agreement termination letter/vacation letter in the format prescribed by our Client;

    **(e)** Hand over all keys, access cards, remote controls, and other peripherals belonging to the Said Property;

    **(f)** Pay all utility bills, electricity charges, water charges, and any other outstanding dues pertaining to the Said Property up to the date of vacation;

    **(g)** Restore the Said Property to its original condition, fair wear and tear excepted, and repair any damages caused during your tenancy period.

---

### TIME PERIOD FOR COMPLIANCE

14. That you are hereby given **FIFTEEN (15) / THIRTY (30)** days from the date of receipt/Service of this Legal Notice to remedy the breach and comply with the demands as set out hereinabove.

---

### CONSEQUENCE OF NON-COMPLIANCE

15. That **IF YOU FAIL, NEGLECT, OR REFUSE** to comply with the demands made in this Legal Notice within the stipulated time period, our Client shall be constrained to initiate **LEGAL PROCEEDINGS** against you, including but not limited to:

    **(a)** Filing of a suit for recovery of outstanding rent and damages before the appropriate Civil Court of competent jurisdiction;

    **(b)** Filing of an application/petition for eviction before the competent Rent Control Authority/Tribunal under the applicable Rent Control Act;

    **(c)** Claiming mesne profits/damages for the period of illegal occupation beyond the termination of tenancy;

    **(d)** Claiming costs, charges, and expenses of and incidental to the legal proceedings, including advocate's fees;

    **(e)** Any other remedy available under the law.

16. That the expenses incurred by our Client in connection with this Legal Notice and the subsequent legal proceedings shall be recoverable from you.

---

### WITHOUT PREJUDICE CLAUSE

17. That nothing
